source_path: 4. Contact360 Extension and Sales Navigator maturity/4.3.100 — Docker extension API smoke evidence.md
title: 4.3.100 - Docker extension API smoke evidence
summary: Docker-based endpoint verification for `EC2/extension.server` contract behavior.
flowcharts:
flowchart LR

contract.text: Document both malformed-json and valid-empty payload behavior for `/v1/save-profiles`.

service.text: Enforce stable auth-first response path for missing API key independent of payload parse outcome.

surface.text: Align extension popup copy for 400 parse errors vs 401/403 auth errors.

data.text: Add docker fixture payloads (`empty`, `5-valid`, `>500`, `malformed`) for deterministic smoke runs.

ops.text: Add contract assertions for `501 /v1/scrape` and `200 accepted:0` on empty valid profile list.

sections.heading: Focus
sections.prose: Docker-based endpoint verification for `EC2/extension.server` contract behavior.
